traces.title: Istanbul afternoon run
traces.description: Multi-tool loop with thinking, a failed API call, and recovery.

messages.content: I'm in Istanbul and want to go for a run this afternoon. Is that a good idea, and when should I head out?

content.thinking: Before recommending a time I should check three things: the weather, the air quality, and whether the user is actually free this afternoon. I'll call the tools one at a time and reason about each result.

content.text: Good question — let me check a few things for you.
Weather looks ideal. Now checking the air quality.
The air quality service is down — I'll note that and proceed without it.

Yes — this afternoon is a good window for a run.

• Head out around 14:30. It's 22°C and clear, with a light 12 km/h wind.
• Finish by ~16:45 so you have time to cool down before your 17:30 Design review.
• I couldn't confirm air quality — the service timed out — so if you're sensitive to it, glance at a local app before you leave.

Have a good run!

traces.title: Find auth middleware
traces.description: Short trace: search codebase, read file, answer.

messages.content: Where is JWT auth middleware defined in this repo?

content.thinking: I'll search for jwt or auth middleware symbols, then open the most likely file.

content.content:
src/middleware/auth.ts:12: export function authMiddleware
src/routes/api.ts:3: import { authMiddleware }

content.text: JWT auth middleware lives in `src/middleware/auth.ts`. It reads the Bearer token, verifies it with `verifyJwt`, attaches `req.user`, or returns 401.
